  "complexity_notes": "The file implements a standard async FastAPI backend with SQLAlchemy ORM. It features JWT authentication, CRUD endpoints for projects with pagination, background task processing, and WebSocket-based real-time broadcasting. Complexity is moderate, relying heavily on framework abstractions (FastAPI dependencies, Pydantic models, SQLAlchemy async sessions). Notable structural points include a mid-file import of JSONResponse, hardcoded configuration values, and a simple in-memory WebSocket manager suitable for single-instance deployments. The code follows modern Python typing and async/await patterns consistently."
